page.title: A mesh of souls
page.subtitle: The people woven into your sky — each a whole chart, read from your own.
page.computed_note: Every edge is computed on this device. Your birth data never leaves it.

invitation.title: Weave your first thread
invitation.body: AlmaMesh reads relationships between whole charts — yours and the people close to you. Mark your own profile as "this is me" and add at least one person to begin.
invitation.hint: People live in Settings. Each gets a full chart of their own.

edge.title: {{anchor}} · {{member}}
edge.frame: Two finished charts, read side by side. Neither changes the other.
edge.computing: Weaving this edge on your device — {{elapsed}} so far.
edge.error_title: This edge could not be computed
edge.needs_chart_member: {{name}} doesn't have a generated chart yet. The edge reads two finished charts.
edge.needs_chart_anchor: Your own chart isn't generated yet. The edge reads two finished charts.

compat.heading: Compatibility
compat.roles_label: The classical tables are role-asymmetric — choose whose chart the bride-table rules read for.
compat.total_note: Classical convention — a label, not a verdict.
compat.mangal_summary_has: Carries the dosha on at least one reference.
compat.mangal_mutual: Mutually cancelled — both charts carry it, which the tables read as compatible.

maitri.heading: Graha Maitri
maitri.note: Of the classical match tables, the friendship of the two Moon-sign lords is the one that generalizes beyond marriage. The remaining tables are read only for spouse and partner edges.

connection.heading: Connection
connection.none: No contacts in this convention's scope.

synchrony.heading: Together in time
synchrony.boundary_note: Both charts turn a period at this boundary.
synchrony.empty: No joint windows fall inside this range.

reading.heading: AI reading
reading.cta_title: Connect a model to narrate this edge
reading.cta_body: Everything above is computed on your device and stands on its own. An optional AI model can narrate it in plain language — it never computes or changes a single number.
